_comment: Non-prompt wiring for the morning-brief cloud routine. The PROMPT lives only in SKILL.md. Deploy reads SKILL.md verbatim into the trigger body and applies this config to session_context. See deploy.md.
name: morning-brief-stampede

_notes.Task_required: Task IS in allowed_tools because the cold-start MCP bug (anthropics/claude-code#43397) still bites this routine's runtime despite the claimed v2.1.105 fix — verified 2026-06-03: a no-delegation single agent could not see Gmail/Drive. The top-level orchestrator delegates the whole job to ONE worker subagent, which DOES get the MCP tools.
_notes.model_split: session_context.model (this 'model' field) = claude-sonnet-4-6 is the OUTER orchestrator, which only spawns the worker. The worker subagent runs on claude-opus-4-8, set via the Task call's model param inside SKILL.md. The worker composes inline — no second subagent (one hop, not the original two).
_notes.drive_tools: Google Drive metadata + read_file_content are reached via the connected Google-Drive server; the connector's permitted_tools is empty (= all tools allowed).
